title: VerifyIdentityReportEntry
description: One entry in the `rebar verify-identity --format json` report array (epic gnu-whale-ichor, AC7). The report holds one object per NON-`verified` in-scope mutating event; `verified` events are omitted. `commit` is the event's resolved introducing tracker-branch commit (null when unresolvable); `author` is the event's author_id (null for a ledger entry, where the author is recovered from the signature at verify time). `display` is the three-way grouping and `verdict` the raw classification. `grandfathered` is true when the event's commit predates the `--since` / identity.enforce_since boundary, so it is reported but does not fail the gate.
